text.title: stream-json-orchestration Procedure
text.summary: Seven-step procedure for spawning the agent CLI, consuming its stream-json output, and producing a validated run report.

step.name: prepare-invocation
step.input: Task prompt, allowed-tools list, max-turns, budget cap, log dir.
step.action: Assemble the argv list with `--output-format stream-json`, `--include-partial-messages`, `--allowedTools "..."`, `--max-turns N`. Validate that none of these is missing.
step.decision-gate: If `--allowedTools` or `--max-turns` missing — refuse to spawn.

step.name: spawn-subprocess
step.action: Open `subprocess.Popen(argv, stdout=PIPE, stderr=PIPE, stdin=DEVNULL, bufsize=1, text=True)`. Open the replay JSONL file at `runs/<to-be-filled>.jsonl` for append-as-events-arrive.

step.name: consume-events
step.action: For each non-empty line: parse JSON with try/except (log decode errors, continue). Append the raw line to the replay log. On the `system/init` event, capture `session_id` and rename the replay log to `runs/<session_id>.jsonl`.
step.decision-gate: On `JSONDecodeError` log to stderr sink — never crash the orchestrator.

step.name: apply-budget-cap
step.action: Update `total_cost_usd` from `event.get("total_cost_usd")` if present. If `total_cost_usd > cap`, call `proc.kill()`, set `kill_reason="budget_cap"`, break out of the loop.
step.output: Either continuation or killed-process with reason.

step.name: apply-safety-veto
step.action: For each `tool_use`, look up the tool name + arguments against the veto rule set. On a denied call: `proc.kill()`, `kill_reason="safety_veto"`, break.
step.output: Either continuation or killed-process with reason.
step.decision-gate: Veto fires BEFORE the tool runs because the model emits `tool_use` before the tool actually executes.

step.name: finalize-on-result
step.input: The `result` event emitted at the end of the run.
step.action: Set `result_subtype` from the event, set final `total_cost_usd`, set `ended_at` to now. Close the replay log. Compute `events_count`.

step.name: validate-and-persist
step.action: Call `scripts/validate-stream-json-orchestration.py run-report.json`. On PASS, write the report next to the replay log; on FAIL, surface the violation list and refuse to mark the run as complete.
step.output: Persisted `runs/<session_id>.report.json` and a return code matching `result_subtype`.
step.decision-gate: If validate exits non-zero — the orchestrator is broken; quarantine the report for inspection.
